narrative: A potential safety signal has been identified between Tramadol and Seizure. Across 369 reports, this combination occurs 6.85x more frequently than expected relative to the background reporting rate (PRR = 6.85, ROR = 8.74), representing a strong disproportionality signal. Of these reports, 14 involved a fatal outcome and 97 required hospitalization, indicating this signal warrants clinical review. This automated output is a preliminary screening result and should be confirmed by a qualified pharmacovigilance reviewer against individual case narratives before any regulatory action is considered.
